message:
fix: use Ctrl for all keyboard shortcuts and fix frame skipping

- Changed all keyboard shortcuts to use Ctrl instead of Cmd for
  cross-platform consistency (Ctrl+Q, Ctrl+L, Ctrl+R, etc.)
- Updated README.md and CLI help text to reflect Ctrl shortcuts
- Extended ShortcutKey to support both char keys and special keys
- Fixed frame skipping by moving FPS throttle check AFTER getting
  frame to ensure ACKs flow properly for adaptive throttling

files.patch:
@@ -77,19 +77,17 @@ termweb help
 ### Keyboard
 | Key | Action |
 |-----|--------|
-| `Cmd+Q` / `Cmd+W` | Quit |
-| `Cmd+L` | Focus address bar |
-| `Cmd+R` | Reload page |
-| `Cmd+[` | Go back |
-| `Cmd+]` | Go forward |
-| `Cmd+.` | Stop loading |
-| `Cmd+T` | Show tab picker |
-| `Cmd+C` | Copy selection |
-| `Cmd+X` | Cut selection |
-| `Cmd+V` | Paste |
-| `Cmd+A` | Select all |
-
-> **Note:** On Linux, use `Ctrl` instead of `Cmd`.
+| `Ctrl+Q` / `Ctrl+W` | Quit |
+| `Ctrl+L` | Focus address bar |
+| `Ctrl+R` | Reload page |
+| `Ctrl+[` | Go back |
+| `Ctrl+]` | Go forward |
+| `Ctrl+.` | Stop loading |
+| `Ctrl+T` | Show tab picker |
+| `Ctrl+C` | Copy selection |
+| `Ctrl+X` | Cut selection |
+| `Ctrl+V` | Paste |
+| `Ctrl+A` | Select all |
 
 ### Mouse
 - **Click** - Interact with page elements (links, buttons, inputs)
